name: send_otp_sms
description: Send a one-time passcode via SMS to a phone number. The code is valid for a configurable number of minutes. If the phone number doesn't match an existing user, a new user is created.

parameters.name: phone_number
parameters.description: The phone number in E.164 format (e.g., +14155551234).

parameters.name: expiration_minutes
parameters.description: How long the OTP is valid in minutes (1-10). Defaults to 2.

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: Language for the SMS. Supported: en, es, fr, pt-br.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Associate this phone number with an existing user by their ID.
